{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bloodmaker Pill
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Bloodmaker Pill]] is a recipe consisting of four downy shrike feathers, a shaved spring branch of a marauder root, three [[life]]-aspected herb leaves, fire aspect [[Remnant]] blood essence, and water aspect [[Remnant]] blood essence.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Bloodmaker Pill]] must be refined in a refinery of twelfth grade or higher using the Six-Pointed [[Star]] method.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Bloodmaker Pill]] carries the blood aspect and improves the basic spiritual foundation.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Bloodmaker Pill]] is most effective when taken before the [[Copper stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
